title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Decathlon India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Decathlon India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Decathlon India in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Decathlon India:
Decathlon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
